mapper.sql: select tx_time, card_id, line_name, stop_name, card_type, base_price, actual_amount, is_transfer, policy_support, stat_year, stat_month, stat_day, stat_hour from fact_card_transactions
mapper.select: SELECT stop_name as stopName, line_name as lineName, COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(is_transfer) as transferCount, CAST(SUM(is_transfer) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / COUNT(*) * 100 as transferRate FROM fact_card_transactions WHERE is_transfer IS NOT NULL GROUP BY stop_name, line_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 100 ORDER BY transferRate DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE(tx_time) as date, COUNT(*) as dailyCount, SUM(actual_amount) as dailyAmount, AVG(actual_amount) as avgAmount FROM fact_card_transactions WHERE tx_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(tx_time) ORDER BY date ASC
